name: libhtml-tree-perl
title: libhtml-tree-perl
summary: Perl module to represent and create HTML syntax trees
description:
Perl module to represent and create HTML syntax trees
HTML::Tree is a collection of modules that represent, create and extract
information from HTML syntax trees.  These modules used to be part of
the libwww-perl distribution, but are now unbundled in order to
facilitate a separate development track.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-tree-perl because Perl module to represent and create HTML syntax trees.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-tree-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-tree-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-tree-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
